name: (Set of 3) 12"x28" Modern Seaweed Framed Arts Naturals - Threshold™
description:
Bring a modern coastal vibe into your space with the 12"x28" Modern Seaweed Framed Arts Naturals from Threshold™. Each piece in this set of three measures 12"x28" and showcases delicate seaweed illustrations in natural, medium-tone colors, framed in sleek brown frames. Whether hung horizontally or vertically, these digital botanical prints are designed to add a refreshing touch of nature to your decor.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
